values.unknown_name: If unspecified, the offer name is unknown by default

created_at.description: Date and time of the offer creation. (RFC 3339 format)

sla.description: Service Level Agreement percentage of the offer.

max_domains.description: Max number of checked domains that can be associated with the offer.

max_dedicated_ips.description: Max number of dedicated IPs that can be associated with the offer.

included_monthly_emails.description: Number of emails included in the offer per month.

max_webhooks_per_domain.description: Max number of webhooks that can be associated with the offer.

max_custom_blocklists_per_domain.description: Max number of active custom blocklists that can be associated with the offer.
